prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, recreate the exact same photo composition, person, pose, outfit, drink, and background layout, but transform the whole image into a playful childlike hand-drawn crayon-and-colored-pencil sketch on a clean white page. Keep the main subject centered with the face still obscured by a simple beige blur block. Preserve the Thai text on the black T-shirt and the Café Amazon cup branding. Simplify all environmental details into naive doodles with uneven outlines and scribbly coloring: 1 gray car on the left, 1 blue accessible parking sign, 2 streetlights, 3 visible trees, 1 black-roof Amazon storefront, 1 small person in the distant doorway, 1 curb ramp with rails, and the tiled ground drawn as loose perspective grid lines. Make it look intentionally cute, rough, and humorous, like a quick kids' sketch version of the original photo.
